title: Cuneiform Tablet #0263: Neo-Assyrian Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
